name: Sagar Cements Limited
summary: Sagar Cements Limited engages in the manufacturing and selling of cement in India. It operates through Cement Manufacturing and Power Generation segments. The company offers various cements, such as ordinary Portland, Portland Puzzolona, white, Portland, blast furnace slag, oil well, rapid hardening Portland, and water proof, as well as sulphate resistant Portland cements under the Sagar brand. It also operates hydel, waste heat recovery, solar power, hydro power, and thermal power plants. Sagar Cements Limited was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
